title: Research Feature Recommendation Brief: Agentic market intelligence
research_scope: Direct PM platforms, adjacent work platforms, agentic research tools, and competitive-intelligence software relevant to ProductOS research and auto-research.
market_thesis: The market is converging on grounded multi-source research, agentic planning, and human-visible control. ProductOS should differentiate by combining PM-native structure with stricter validation and loophole memory.

recommendations.title: Competitor watchlists with structured deltas
recommendations.summary: Track named competitors, classify direct and indirect overlap, and store capability deltas instead of static summaries.
recommendations.rationale: PM competitors and CI tools now normalize always-on monitoring and change detection.
recommendations.implementation_shape: Add competitor watchlists, recurring evidence refresh, and diff-first summaries to the research command center.
acceptance_signals: ProductOS can refresh a named competitor set without recreating the matrix.
Changed positioning or feature claims are surfaced as deltas, not full rewrites.
guardrails: Do not promote a delta to a recommendation without source evidence and freshness metadata.

recommendations.title: Guided deep-research plans with source controls
recommendations.summary: Create reviewable research plans that let the PM constrain sources before autonomous synthesis begins.
recommendations.rationale: Deep research products are making planning, source selection, and citation-backed reports table stakes.
recommendations.implementation_shape: Add a plan preview step, scoped-source selection, and a report artifact that keeps evidence links and confidence visible.
acceptance_signals: The PM can approve or edit a research plan before the run starts.
The final report separates evidence, inference, and open questions.
guardrails: Do not hide contradictions or missing sources behind a polished report.

recommended_next_action: Implement the agentic market-intelligence workflow and Ralph loop before expanding autonomous research claims.
